heading: Administrative hearings and judicial review
label: 50912 Administrative hearings and judicial review
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70110(a)(1)49 App.:2611(a)(1) (1st sentence)., , .Oct. 30, 1984Pub. L. 98–575, § 1298 Stat. 306070110(a)(2)49 App.:2611(a)(1) (last sentence).70110(a)(3)49 App.:2611(a)(2).70110(b)49 App.:2611(b).In subsection (a), before clause (1), the words “The Secretary of Transportation shall provide an opportunity for a hearing on the record to” are substituted for “shall be entitled to a determination on the record after an opportunity for a hearing” for consistency in the revised title. The words “in accordance with ” are omitted for consistency and because 5:554 applies to a hearing on the record unless otherwise stated. In clause (1), the words “and a proposed transferee of a license” are omitted as being included in “applicant”.section 554 of title 5In subsection (b), the words “to issue, transfer, deny the issuance or transfer of, suspend, revoke, or modify a license or to terminate, prohibit, or suspend any launch or operation of a launch site licensed by the Secretary or to prevent the launch of a payload” are omitted as surplus.

children.text: an applicant under this chapter, for a decision of the Secretary under section 50905(a) or 50906 of this title to issue or transfer a license with terms or deny the issuance or transfer of a license;
an owner or operator of a payload under this chapter, for a decision of the Secretary under to prevent the launch or reentry of the payload; andsection 50904(c) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: section 50908(b) or (c) of this title to modify, suspend, or revoke a license; or

children.label: B
children.text: to prohibit, suspend, or end a launch or operation of a launch site or reentry site, or reentry of a reentry vehicle, licensed by the Secretary.section 50909(a) of this title

children.heading: .—Judicial Review
children.label: b .—Judicial Review
children.text: A final action of the Secretary under this chapter is subject to judicial review as provided in chapter 7 of title 5.
